nodes.label: P2.1 CIFAR — dead-unit and goodness-separation diagnostics across the grid
nodes.rationale: Left panel: batchBN+sq and none+lin collapse to ~100%/~40-70% dead units; the healthy cells (layer+lin, onlineBN+lin, layer+sq) stay near 0%. Right panel: goodness separation for HERO cells (onlineBN+lin, batchBN+lin) stays elevated (rising to ~50 by layer 8) while every per-sample-norm cell collapses toward 0 after layer 2 -- confirms linear goodness fixes dead units (mechanism) but batch-stat cells only inflate separation, not class-separability.
